mapper.select: SELECT region_id, lawd_cd, legal_dong_code, sido, sigungu, umd_nm, lat, lng FROM regions WHERE lawd_cd = #{lawdCd} ORDER BY umd_nm
SELECT house_id, region_id, sgg_cd, umd_nm, jibun, apt_nm, build_year, lat, lng FROM houses WHERE apt_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{aptName}, '%') ORDER BY apt_nm, umd_nm, jibun

SELECT hd.deal_id, hd.house_id, h.apt_nm, h.umd_nm, h.jibun, hd.lawd_cd, hd.deal_ymd, hd.deal_type, hd.rent_type, hd.deal_date, hd.deal_amount, hd.deal_amount_manwon, hd.deposit, hd.deposit_manwon, hd.monthly_rent, hd.monthly_rent_manwon, hd.exclu_use_ar, hd.floor FROM house_deals hd INNER JOIN houses h ON h.house_id = hd.house_id WHERE hd.lawd_cd = #{lawdCd} AND hd.deal_ymd = #{dealYmd} ORDER BY hd.deal_date DESC, h.apt_nm, hd.deal_id DESC

SELECT hd.deal_id, hd.house_id, h.apt_nm, r.sido, r.sigungu, h.umd_nm, h.jibun, h.build_year, hd.lawd_cd, hd.deal_ymd, hd.deal_type, hd.rent_type, hd.deal_date, hd.deal_amount, hd.deal_amount_manwon, hd.deposit, hd.deposit_manwon, hd.monthly_rent, hd.monthly_rent_manwon, hd.exclu_use_ar, hd.floor, hd.contract_term, hd.contract_type, hd.use_rr_right, hd.pre_deposit, hd.pre_deposit_manwon, hd.pre_monthly_rent, hd.pre_monthly_rent_manwon, hd.roadnm, hd.apt_seq, h.lat, h.lng
ORDER BY hd.deal_date ASC, hd.deal_id ASC
ORDER BY hd.deal_amount_manwon IS NULL, hd.deal_amount_manwon DESC, hd.deal_date DESC, hd.deal_id DESC
ORDER BY hd.deal_amount_manwon IS NULL, hd.deal_amount_manwon ASC, hd.deal_date DESC, hd.deal_id DESC
ORDER BY hd.deposit_manwon IS NULL, hd.deposit_manwon DESC, hd.deal_date DESC, hd.deal_id DESC
ORDER BY hd.deposit_manwon IS NULL, hd.deposit_manwon ASC, hd.deal_date DESC, hd.deal_id DESC
ORDER BY hd.monthly_rent_manwon IS NULL, hd.monthly_rent_manwon DESC, hd.deal_date DESC, hd.deal_id DESC
ORDER BY hd.monthly_rent_manwon IS NULL, hd.monthly_rent_manwon ASC, hd.deal_date DESC, hd.deal_id DESC
ORDER BY hd.exclu_use_ar IS NULL, hd.exclu_use_ar DESC, hd.deal_date DESC, hd.deal_id DESC
ORDER BY hd.exclu_use_ar IS NULL, hd.exclu_use_ar ASC, hd.deal_date DESC, hd.deal_id DESC
ORDER BY hd.deal_date DESC, hd.deal_id DESC
LIMIT #{condition.size} OFFSET #{condition.offset}

SELECT MIN(hd.deal_amount_manwon) AS min_deal_amount_manwon, MAX(hd.deal_amount_manwon) AS max_deal_amount_manwon, MIN(hd.deposit_manwon) AS min_deposit_manwon, MAX(hd.deposit_manwon) AS max_deposit_manwon, MIN(hd.monthly_rent_manwon) AS min_monthly_rent_manwon, MAX(hd.monthly_rent_manwon) AS max_monthly_rent_manwon

SELECT import_batch_id, source_api, lawd_cd, deal_ymd, house_type, deal_type, status, total_count, imported_count, skipped_count, error_message, requested_at, completed_at FROM public_data_import_batches WHERE source_api = #{sourceApi} AND lawd_cd = #{lawdCd} AND deal_ymd = #{dealYmd} AND house_type = #{houseType} AND deal_type = #{dealType}
